title: The mindset of a founder we back
introduction: We seek a powerful combination of extreme conviction in the core mission and the intellectual honesty required for swift course correction under pressure. The ideal founder is fiercely protective of the problem they solve, yet humble enough to rigorously listen to data that directly challenges their initial assumptions about the solution. This essential duality ensures they retain market vision while achieving necessary product iteration velocity.

They exhibit relentless, measurable resilience, viewing setbacks not as critical failures but as crucial, temporary learning opportunities that inform the next strategic pivot. This non-emotional approach to market feedback is a defining characteristic of successful founders who consistently scale past early adoption challenges. We look for a deep-seated determination to overcome operational and technical hurdles regardless of the perceived difficulty.

block1.title: The Problem Obsession
paragraphs: The founder must demonstrate a profound, unwavering obsession with solving a structural, high-value problem that justifies immense capital expenditure and market disruption. This intrinsic motivation prevents the team from pivoting to less impactful ideas when execution becomes difficult. We evaluate the depth of this commitment, as it is the fuel for scaling through inevitable periods of market friction and competitive entry.

Their focus must be solely on building lasting, defensible impact and providing genuine structural value to a massive addressable market. This serious approach consistently prioritizes deep value creation over short-term vanity metrics and chasing fleeting hype cycles. We fund founders whose ambition centers on becoming the indispensable technology layer within their chosen ecosystem.

block2.title: Intellectual Honesty Mandate
paragraphs: Intellectual honesty is non-negotiable, demanding a transparent assessment of current product performance against market expectations and user needs. Founders must maintain the capacity to discard failed feature sets or entire business models instantly when the data requires it. This commitment to truth ensures that capital is deployed efficiently toward validated, high-growth vectors.

block3.title: Resilience as Currency
paragraphs: We view demonstrated resilience as a core competency and a key currency in the venture ecosystem, directly mitigating execution risk within our investment thesis. Founders must prove their ability to absorb major operational shockwaves and maintain team focus on the primary objective without emotional compromise. This stamina ensures that initial capital achieves its maximum potential return, protecting the fund's deployment strategy.
